---
name: Framework or operator addition
about: New methodology to encode into reference/
title: "[framework] "
labels: "framework, reference"
assignees: ''
---

## Framework or operator name

The canonical name as the author uses it.

## Target location

- [ ] `reference/frameworks/{name}/` — methodology framework
- [ ] `reference/operators/{slug}.md` — operator playbook
- [ ] `reference/knowledge/` — department-level shared knowledge
- [ ] `reference/swipe-file/` — hooks, headlines, case studies
- [ ] `reference/templates/` — output document structures
- [ ] `reference/platforms/` — platform-specific playbook

## Source surface

Where the methodology is publicly documented:

- Book / publication:
- Curriculum / course:
- YouTube channel / series:
- Website:
- Other:

## Why this addition

Which skills will reference this framework once encoded? Which compartments does it inform?

## Verification plan

How the encoded content will be verified against the source. Notion page IDs, chapter references, video timestamps.

## Attribution note

Every framework file ends with a **Sources** section citing its origin. Paste the attribution line you propose for the file footer.

## Additional context

Anything relevant — operator lineage, related frameworks already in the workspace, known gaps in the source material.
